title: SEC1: BodyType lacks direct serialize/Display unit tests
description: types.rs: BodyType has no direct unit tests for serialize, deserialize, or Display. Coverage is only indirect via fixture-based Message round-trips. Every other hand-rolled enum (SenderIdOrSelf, EndpointType) has targeted tests. When a future maintainer adds a fourth variant, there is no test template. Fix: add tests for BodyType::Plain/Markdown/Rich/Unknown serialize round-trip and Display output, mirroring test_delivery_state_serializes_to_spec_string.
